name: Sample Plan (edit or replace me)
scheduleNote: Example: 3x per week, at least one rest day between sessions.
cardioNote: Optional, doesn't take priority over recovery.
warmup: 5 min easy cardio (bike, row erg, walk)
Ramp into your first compound lift: empty/light x10 → ~50% working weight x5 → ~75% x3 → working sets
Pure accessories: skip the ramp, go straight to working weight
progressionRule: All sets hit the top of the rep range, clean form → add weight next session (smallest available increment).
Some sets hit it, some don't → repeat the same weight.
Miss the bottom of the rep range on any set → repeat the same weight. Miss it two sessions in a row → drop weight ~10% and rebuild.
deloadNote: Every 4th week: same exercises, ~50% working weight, same reps.
watchList: This is a good place to note anything you want the app to remind you about — e.g. "if X starts hurting, swap it."

exerciseNotes.Goblet Squat: Dumbbell held vertically at chest, squat between your legs.
exerciseNotes.Romanian Deadlift: Hip hinge (push hips back), not a squat.
